arts.ttl: Flick hails Barca’s ‘unbelievable’ mentality after Atleti win
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick was a happy man after seeing his team beat Atletico Madrid 4-2 in La Liga on Sunday night . Atletico had led the game 2-0 but were stunned as Barca scored four times in the last 20 minutes to leave their manager smiling.

arts.ttl: Time to win: Flick calls Barça rally 'unbelievable'
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said it was time to beat Atlético Madrid after his side produced a remarkable comeback to win a thrilling game 4-2 at the Metropolitano in LaLiga on Sunday.

arts.ttl: More pain for Atleti as Barça strike pivotal LaLiga title blow
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid's week went from bad to worse on Sunday, losing at home to title rivals Barcelona just days after their Champions League heartbreak.

arts.ttl: Yamal says ‘anger’ fuelled Barca’s stunning comeback
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal couldn’t hide his delight at scoring as Barcelona beat Atletico 4-2 in a thrilling game in La Liga on Sunday . Yamal then made it 3-2 with a lovely goal, before Ferran struck again to completely finish off Atletico.

arts.ttl: Ferran Torres’ double inspires Barcelona to comeback win at Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona fought back from 2-0 down to top La Liga Lewandowski and Lamine Yamal also on target in victory Barcelona’s Ferran Torres scored twice to help secure a late 4-2 comeback win over La Liga title rivals Atlético Madrid in a pulsating clash on Sunday that took Hansi Flick’s side back to the top of the table. The hosts took the lead on the stroke of half-time through Julián Alvarez after Antoine Griezmann broke quickly and found Giuliano Simeone, who curled a precise pass for the former Manchester City forward to score his 11th league goal of the season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: La Liga Title Race: Barcelona, Real Madrid, Atletico Madrid Next Five Games After Matchweek 28
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid are four points clear of Atlético Madrid with 10 matchweeks to go in the La Liga title race.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make offer for Raphinha - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Barcelona's Raphinha is linked with a return to England, Eduardo Camavinga is on Manchester City's radar, and Premier League rivals target Marcus Thuram.

arts.ttl: Barça go top as Yamal, Torres cap rally vs. Atleti
arts.sum: Barcelona's Ferran Torres' scored twice to help secure a late 4-2 comeback win at Atletico Madrid in a pulsating LaLiga clash on Sunday that took the Catalans back to the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Takeaways: Atlético’s week from hell ends with a Barcelona rally at the Metropolitano
arts.sum: Goals from Julián Alvarez and Alexander Sørloth had the red and white side of Madrid bouncing, but Barça hit back instantaneously through Robert Lewandowski, Ferrán Torres and a horribly-deflected Lamine Yamal shot. The last 19 days have seen Atlético play Real Madrid twice, Barcelona twice, Athletic Club and Getafe CF across three different competitions.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid 2-4 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as stunning late turnaround sees Catalan giants return to La Liga summit
arts.sum: Barcelona fight back from two goals behind to record a stunning 4-2 victory over title rivals Atletico Madrid in Sunday night's La Liga contest at Wanda Metropolitano.
